title: After executing the encryption command on two Linux servers, the image inspect MIMEType is inconsistent
body:
After executing the encryption command on two Linux servers, one contains application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar.gzip+encrypted, while the other does not
I implemented the following command using practical Java code

mkdir -p oci/{input,output}

skopeo copy docker:unencrypted:latest dir:./oci/input

docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/oci:/oci" "$KEY_PROVIDER_IMAGE"
/encrypt.sh -k "$KEY_B64" -i "$KEY_ID" -s "dir:/oci/input" -d "dir:/oci/output"
skopeo version 1.18.0
Docker version 29.3.1
containerd version v2.2.2

https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers/issues/12744

comments.body:
> 在两台 Linux 服务器上执行加密命令后，一台服务器上包含 application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar.gzip+encrypted ，而另一台服务器上则没有。 我使用 Java 代码实现了以下命令： `docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/oci:/oci" "$KEY_PROVIDER_IMAGE" /encrypt.sh -k "$KEY_B64" -i "$KEY_ID" -s "dir:/oci/input" -d "dir:/oci/output"`。 我的 skopeo 版本为 1.18.0 ，Docker 版本为 29.3.1， containerd 版本为 v2.2.2。
> 
> [kata-containers/kata-containers#12744](https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers/issues/12744)

I’m afraid there is literally nothing to go on in this report; not even any Skopeo invocation.

Steps to reproduce / expected results / actual results?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
